nasb.text: Moreover, they shall take some of the blood and put it on the two doorposts and on the lintel of the houses in which they eat it.

esv.text: “Then they shall take some of the blood and put it on the two doorposts and the lintel of the houses in which they eat it.

cnv.text: 他們要取點血，塗在吃羊羔的房屋兩邊的門柱和門楣上。

ccb.text: 然后取点血涂在房子的门框和门楣上，全家要在房子里吃羊肉。
